projectDescription: An agent-agnostic memory layer that captures facts from any coding agent, gates sensitive writes behind human review, and recalls memories everywhere via MCP.
keyFeatures: Agent-agnostic: works with Claude Code, Codex, opencode, and any MCP-capable client
Local-first: all memories stored as plain Markdown + YAML on your machine, no telemetry
Tiered write safety: low-risk facts auto-log, sensitive kinds (fiscal, identity, health) require human approval
MCP-native: exposes remember tool and memory://recall resource over stdio
Transcript harvesting: mine durable facts from past sessions using any OpenAI-compatible local or cloud model
Full audit trail: atomic writes, append-only audit.jsonl, single-step undo tokens
Memory lifecycle: confidence, decay horizon, last_verified, dedup, conflict detection, doctor report
publicApiSurface: Kind enum: preference, identity, fiscal, people, project, constraint, infra, tooling, health, location
Status enum: pending, promoted, rejected, stale
Config: store.dir, extractor.base_url, extractor.model, extractor.api_key, bridge.autopromote, bridge.kind_allowlist
Env vars: ENGRAM_STORE, ENGRAM_CONFIG, ENGRAM_AUTOPROMOTE, ENGRAM_EXTRACTOR_URL, ENGRAM_EXTRACTOR_MODEL, ENGRAM_EXTRACTOR_KEY, ENGRAM_BRIDGE_KIND_ALLOWLIST
